lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. Where are Islwyn and Eluned?

lines.speaker: Elven Scout
lines.text: They'll be in Prifddinas of course. With the city restored there's not much reason for them to come out here.

lines.speaker: Elven Scout
lines.text: They'll be in the Underground Pass, preparing for the fight against Lord Iorwerth.

sections.title: When carrying an uncharged Teleport crystal

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. Where are Islwyn and Eluned?

lines.speaker: Elven Scout
lines.text: They'll be in Prifddinas of course. With the city restored there's not much reason for them to come out here.

lines.speaker: Elven Scout
lines.text: They'll be in the Underground Pass, preparing for the fight against Lord Iorwerth.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I need someone to re-enchant my teleport crystal.

lines.speaker: Elven Scout
lines.text: Well I can do that if you want.

lines.speaker: Elven Scout
lines.text: I ask [charge price] coins to cover my costs.
